programs.title: Army Wives
programs.desc: The tribe prepares to leave Fort Marshall and go their separate ways. Roxy has a hard time adjusting to the idea of moving. Amid the base closing, Joan is busy getting the fort ready for an incoming hurricane.

programs.title: Army Wives
programs.desc: In the aftermath of the hurricane, one Army wife fights for her life, another searches for a place to live after her apartment building is destroyed and Joan gets overwhelmed trying to manage the after-effects of the storm.
